rule_metadata.author: Ján Trenčanský, frack113
rule_metadata.title: Windows Defender Threat Detection Service Disabled

rules.rule_text:
title: Windows Defender Threat Detection Service Disabled
id: 6c0a7755-6d31-44fa-80e1-133e57752680
related:
- id: fe34868f-6e0e-4882-81f6-c43aa8f15b62
  type: derived
status: stable
description: Detects when the "Windows Defender Threat Protection" service is disabled.
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/defender-endpoint/troubleshoot-microsoft-defender-antivirus
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1562.001/T1562.001.md
author: "J\xE1n Tren\u010Dansk\xFD, frack113"
date: 2020-07-28
modified: 2024-07-02
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1562.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: system
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 7036
    Provider_Name: Service Control Manager
    param1:
    - Windows Defender Antivirus Service
    - Service antivirus Microsoft Defender
    param2:
    - stopped
    - "arr\xEAt\xE9"
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Administrator actions
- Auto updates of Windows Defender causes restarts
level: medium
